Custom-fitted to your Mazda CX-5, these All-Weather Floor Mats guard against snow, mud, sand and whatever else comes through the door. Set of 4. Resists water and grime. High-wall design provides additional protection from shifting liquids and makes it even easier to clean.
RHODIUM WHITE METALLIC PAINT CHARGE

Custom-fitted to your Mazda CX-5, these All-Weather Floor Mats guard against snow, mud, sand and whatever else comes through the door. Set of 4. Resists water and grime. High-wall design provides additional protection from shifting liquids and makes it even easier to clean.

accessories.Name: Splash Guards Front & Rear
accessories.Description: Protect your Mazda's finish from rocks and other road debris with Mazda's Splash Guards. Front and Rear included.

accessories.Name: Carpet Cargo Mat
accessories.Description: Maintain your CX-5's original carpet with a custom fitted carpet Cargo Mat. Thick pile carpet provides the perfect foundation for sensitive cargo, reduces road noise, and is the perfect companion for our available Cargo Blocks.

accessories.Name: Rear Bumper Guard
accessories.Description: Our durable Rear Bumper Guard protects the rear bumper from chips and scratches when you’re loading or unloading your gear.

accessories.Name: Retractable Cargo Cover
accessories.Description: Keep your valuables out of view from prying eyes and your groceries fresh from the freezer. Blocks visibility into your cargo space while also blocking sun. Our Retractable Cargo Cover is easy to install and remove.

accessories.Name: Cargo Tray
accessories.Description: This flexible, durable Cargo Tray protects against damage and spills by elevating your cargo on top of grooves designed to help divert and catch any messy liquids. Removes easily for quick cleanup.

accessories.Name: Wheel Locks, Chrome (set of 4)
accessories.Description: Protect your investment and help keep your wheels safe from theft with our custom-keyed chrome Wheel Locks.

accessories.Name: First Aid Kit
accessories.Description: Our First Aid Kit puts first aid supplies where they are needed, when they are needed. FDA compliant. Includes bandages, gauze pads, non-adherent dressings, towelettes, adhesive tape, sting relief pads, antibiotic ointments, and more!

accessories.Name: All-Weather Floor Mats
accessories.Description: Thick and durable All-Weather Floor Mats provide full protection for your floors with stylish yet rugged metal CX-5 badging. Help keep the great outdoors in its place. Custom-fitted to your Mazda CX-5, these All-Weather Floor Mats guard against snow, mud, sand and whatever else comes through the door. Set of 4. Resists water and grime. High-wall design provides additional protection from shifting liquids and makes it even easier to clean.
